title: ophrys cornuta var. orientalis
intro: Ophrys cornuta var. orientalis, also known as the Oriental Bee Orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ophrys cornuta var. orientalis include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe coughs, and ease congestion. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
